title: Wire orphaned preprocess estimators into lib.rs (LabelBinarizer, MultiLabelBinarizer, SelectFpr/Fdr/Fwe, SequentialFeatureSelector, feature scoring fns)
description:
Five orphan files in ferrolearn-preprocess/src/ contain ~5 estimators + 3 module-level scoring functions + 1 enum that are never declared via pub mod / pub use:

- label_binarizer.rs: LabelBinarizer + FittedLabelBinarizer
- multi_label_binarizer.rs: MultiLabelBinarizer + FittedMultiLabelBinarizer
- stat_selectors.rs: SelectFpr/Fdr/Fwe + Fitted* variants
- sequential_feature_selector.rs: SequentialFeatureSelector + Direction enum + FittedSequentialFeatureSelector
- feature_scoring.rs: f_classif, f_regression, chi2 module-level functions

Same orphan-bug pattern as ferrolearn-tree (#267), ferrolearn-linear (#284), ferrolearn-decomp (#294). Fix with pub mod + pub use.
